{"step_by_step_thinking": "Vimentin, keratin, and desmin are all known to be components of intermediate filaments. Vimentin is a type III intermediate filament found in mesenchymal cells. Keratins are a family of intermediate filaments found in epithelial cells. Desmin is a type II intermediate filament found in muscle cells. Tubulin, on the other hand, is a component of microtubules, not intermediate filaments.", "answer_choice": "D"}
